zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock於1223年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾登。她於大約1241年與Gilbert Woodcock在英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾登結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock于1223年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾爾登。她于大约1241年与Gilbert Woodcock在英国英格兰藍卡爾爾登结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Woodcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English wodecok ‘woodcock’ (Old English wuducocc, a compound of Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cocc ‘cock, bird’), a type of bird that is notoriously easy to catch. Therefore, the name might have been either for a person who caught or sold woodcock, or a nickname for a gullible person.

in some cases, because there can be confusion between -cock and -cot in surnames, and therefore the name may also be a variant of Woodcott, a habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, such as Woodcott in Cheshire and Hampshire or Woodcote in Hampshire, Surrey, Oxfordshire, Warwickshire, and Shropshire, or from any residence at a cottage in or near a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock was born in 1223, in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married Gilbert Woodcock about 1241, in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock est née en 1223, à Cuerden, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Gilbert Woodcock environ 1241, à Cuerden, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock wurde 1223 in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1241 in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Gilbert Woodcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock è nata il nel 1223 nel Cuerden, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Gilbert Woodcock circa 1241, nel Cuerden, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock(은)는 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c르든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c르든에서 Gilbert Woodcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock nasceu em 1223, em Cuerden, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Woodcock aproximadamente 1241, em Cuerden, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Gilbert Woodcock родилась в 1223 г. в местности куирден, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Woodcock около 1241 г. в местности куирден, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в её родном городе.
